trains.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 8 to 12 minutes to Central station off-peak.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Toowong via Milton Road, Coronation Drive, and Sylvan Road.

driving.motorway_access: Coronation Drive and Western Freeway access.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 6 to 10 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

secondary_state.name: Indooroopilly State High School or Toowong State High School catchment

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Toowong Village is the suburb's main shopping centre with full-line retail and dining. High Street has additional cafes and restaurants.
lifestyle.river_access: Brisbane River frontage along Sylvan Road and the riverside apartment market.

pockets.name: Family streets
pockets.character: Quiet residential character with established family homes. Toowong State School catchment is the central buyer driver.

pockets.name: Riverside / Sylvan Road
pockets.character: Apartment market with river outlooks. Premium positioning.

pockets.name: High Street and station precinct
pockets.character: Mix of apartments and townhouses close to transport and shopping.

buyer_profile.note: Toowong State School catchment access is a central driver.
Wesley Hospital nearby and UQ via the river make Toowong a natural choice for medical and academic professionals.
Riverside apartments and station-adjacent apartments support a strong professional buyer pool.
